content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.email.office365
FILE: cosmos/integration/email/office365.py (675 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Office 365 Integration

"Good news, everyone! I can manage your Microsoft 365 email!"

Full Microsoft 365 / Office 365 integration including:
- Email management
- Calendar integration
- Mailbox filtering
- Security & Compliance
- Admin functions (with proper permissions)

CLASSES:
- O365AuthType(Enum): Office 365 authentication types.
- O365Config: Office 365 configuration.
- EmailMessage: Email message structure.
- MailFolder: Mail folder structure.
- Office365Integration: Microsoft 365 / Office 365 Integration.

Prerequisites:
1. Register an app in Az
  Methods: def get_auth_url(self, scopes: List[str]=None) -> str
  Methods: async def exchange_code_for_token(self, auth_code: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def authenticate_app_only(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def list_messages(self, folder: str='inbox', user: str='me', top: int=50, filter_query: str=No
  Methods: async def get_message(self, message_id: str, user: str='me', include_headers: bool=False) -> EmailMe
  Methods: async def send_message(self, to: List[str], subject: str, body: str, cc: List[str]=None, bcc: List[s
  Methods: async def move_message(self, message_id: str, destination_folder_id: str, user: str='me') -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_message(self, message_id: str, user: str='me', permanent: bool=False) -> bool
